name: Block Operation Contract
decision_reason: SagaScript plan-block-edit emits block_patch_preview_v1.json as preview-only block operation contract metadata. Tests cover one allowed string literal edit preview, forbidden operation rejection, unknown operation rejection, opaque block rejection, unsupported block rejection, and source no-mutation checks. Actual patch application, source mutation, editor UI, block editing UI, runtime/server changes, package/distribution output, SDE work, and maintainer verification remain absent.
